name: sojoy-19doors
description: 19分贝门窗 - 高端系统门窗管理平台

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install --cache /tmp/npm-cache && cd ../frontend && npm install --cache /tmp/npm-cache
scripts.db:setup: cd backend && npx prisma db push && npx ts-node prisma/seed.ts
